summary: Frontend testing of 2 new features completed: Password reset (admin can reset user passwords) and Login button moved below app cards. All 7 test features passed successfully.
passed_tests: Portal page: Login button ('Anmelden / Registrieren') appears BELOW the 3 app cards - Y position 700.5 vs card Y 413.4
Login page: 'Passwort vergessen? Wenden Sie sich an den Administrator.' hint text visible below login form
Admin users page: Password reset key icons visible for non-admin users (found 2 buttons for 2 non-admin users)
Admin clicks key icon -> inline password reset form appears with input field placeholder 'Neues Passwort (min. 6 Zeichen)' and 'Zurücksetzen' button
Admin resets student password to 'TestNeu123' -> success toast 'Passwort wurde zurückgesetzt' appears
Student (schueler@test.de) can login with new password 'TestNeu123' - redirects to portal with 'Willkommen!' toast
After login, portal shows 'Angemeldet als Max Mustermann' and 'Abmelden' logout button below app cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: New password reset feature fully working. Admin can reset any non-admin user's password via key icon (data-testid='reset-pw-{user_id}'). Inline form appears with input (data-testid='new-pw-input-{user_id}') and confirm button (data-testid='confirm-reset-pw-{user_id}'). Login button and auth info (username + logout) are now positioned below app cards on Portal page. Student user (Max Mustermann / schueler@test.de) password was temporarily changed to 'TestNeu123' during test and reset back to 'Test1234!'.
